title: phrygia nigra
intro: Phrygia nigra, also known as Phrygian tea or Bohea tea, is a type of black tea that originated from the Phrygian region in Asia Minor. The medicinal properties of Phrygia nigra include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Phrygia nigra include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of stress and anxiety. Phrygia nigra can be prepared as a tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, or as a powder supplement, with some herbalists also recommending it as a component in traditional medicinal blends.
